title: Create Combined Type Graph Option for Dashboards
excerpt: I’d love to see a Combined Graph Type option for dashboards! Currently, visualizing data across multiple metrics requires separate widgets, leading to cluttered dashboards. A combined graph—allowing both bar and line cha…

posts.author: cpap (Corinna)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d love to see a Combined Graph Type option for dashboards! Currently, visualizing data across multiple metrics requires separate widgets, leading to cluttered dashboards. A combined graph—allowing both bar and line charts within the same widget—would provide clearer insights by enabling users to compare trends (lines) against absolute values (bars) in a single view.

This feature would be invaluable for project tracking and resource management, making it easier to analyze project velocity vs. resource allocation, planned vs. actual progress, or financial forecasts vs. actual spend. Teams could also use it to track task completion trends against workload distribution, helping identify bottlenecks and optimize efficiency at a glance.

By reducing dashboard clutter and improving data storytelling, this feature would enhance decision-making for project-driven teams. Hope you’ll consider adding it!
